attractions.name: Castelo de São Jorge
attractions.description: Moorish castle on the highest hill of Lisbon with panoramic views over the city and Tagus

attractions.name: Museu Nacional do Azulejo
attractions.description: Unique museum dedicated to Portuguese decorative tiles, housed in a former convent

attractions.name: Mosteiro dos Jerónimos
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage Manueline monastery in Belém, masterpiece of Portuguese architecture

attractions.name: Tram 28 Route
attractions.description: Iconic vintage tram ride through historic neighborhoods: Graça, Alfama, Baixa, Estrela
attractions.frequency: Daily, frequent service, use Viva Viagem card

attractions.name: Time Out Market Lisboa
attractions.description: Gourmet food hall in Mercado da Ribeira with top Lisbon chefs and restaurants

attractions.name: Parque Natural de Sintra-Cascais
attractions.description: Fairy-tale palaces, lush forests, and Atlantic cliffs just 30 min from Lisbon
attractions.frequency: Day trip by train, palace tickets vary

attractions.name: Fado in Alfama
attractions.description: Traditional Portuguese fado music in intimate venues throughout the Alfama quarter

attractions.name: LX Factory
attractions.description: Creative hub in a converted industrial complex with shops, restaurants, and events

attractions.name: Praia de Carcavelos
attractions.description: Wide sandy beach 20 min from Lisbon by train, surfing, beach bars
attractions.frequency: Year-round, train from Cais do Sodré

attractions.name: Feira da Ladra (Thieves' Market)
attractions.description: Lisbon's famous flea market in Campo de Santa Clara, antiques and curiosities

attractions.name: Sé de Lisboa (Lisbon Cathedral)
attractions.description: 12th-century Romanesque cathedral, oldest church in Lisbon, archaeological cloister
